title: Struck Silver!
description: Discover Many Silver-Related Items, Alongside New Tools, Weapons & Gear!
body:
##  A Simple Mod That Adds a Brand-New Material: Silver!

**It acts as a regular ore, being used for creating tools, armour, nuggets and soon quite a lot more! This mod is supposed to be quite simple, however should act as a nice addition to any modded playthrough!**

### Silver:
**Welcomed in, are the new silver items, being: Silver, Silver Nuggets, Silver Ore and Blocks of Silver! They can be decorative and very useful at times!**
![Silver Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af54ad43fc2aec1f1e550858e7806fa1f908543e.png)

### Armour:
**There are new pieces of gear, each with a brand-new, shiny look! They are very useful for your many adventures and should hopefully fit in quite well with the rest of your equipment!**
![Silver Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e4d28eac32d77b14b22d478b045571f02151bd0.png)

### Weapons & Tools
**Similarly, you can now craft new tools of silver that are very close to being at diamond-level, just a few times more common than them in the caves. They are a great upgrade from iron and should help you dig, mine and have fun!**
![Silver Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f66bc97d8888dadd82dfb589fbd9f3835a60090_0.webp)

*The mod is in its early stages and may contain bugs, errors or broken mechanics, although I am working hard to make this mod as amazing as it can be!*
-----------------------------------------------------
